sections.description: Auto-generate barcodes, design label templates, manage a print queue, and add products in seconds with the mobile Quick Add workflow.
sections.changelog:
1.2.2

  • New: Live camera barcode scanner — tap 📷 on Quick Add or Inventory scanner to open a real-time camera view that automatically detects and looks up a barcode the moment it appears in frame.
  • New: Animated scan line and viewfinder corners for clear camera UX.
  • Graceful fallback message on browsers without BarcodeDetector (Safari/iOS).

1.2.1

  • Maintenance release.

1.2.0

  • New: Batch Create page and Scan-to-Publish workflow.

1.1.5

  • Fixed: Quick Add barcode lookup broken in three ways.

1.1.0

  • New: Inventory management module.

1.0.0

  • Initial release.
